ddls:
CREATE TABLE "security_requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security requirement */,
  "original_version" REAL /* Original version of the requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., Deprecated, Merged, Updated) */,
  "removed_version" REAL /* Version in which the requirement was removed (if applicable) */,
  "removal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for removal (if applicable) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the requirement */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the requirement */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the requirement (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_requirements_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_requirements_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_requirements_removed_version FOREIGN KEY ("removed_version") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_requirements_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Deprecated, Merged, Updated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the status is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" REAL /* Version number (e.g., 2.3, 3.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the application */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the application */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the application is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_requirements" (
  "app_req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application requirement */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security requirement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was assigned to the application */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_requirements_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_requirements_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_requirements_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_requirements_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES security_requirements ("req_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, security analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, security analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "app_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the application version was released */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the application version */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the application version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "req_changes" (
  "req_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement change */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security requirement */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., updated, deprecated) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was recorded */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_req_changes_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES security_requirements ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_req_changes_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance standard */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the compliance standard is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance standard was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance standard was last modified */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the compliance standard */,
  "modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the compliance standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "req_compliance" (
  "req_compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement compliance */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security requirement */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance standard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was assigned to the requirement */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_req_compliance_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_req_compliance_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES security_requirements ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_req_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES compliance_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security requirement */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was recorded */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES security_requirements ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
